author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Detailed Star Atlas Roadmap

Hey everyone! 

We're extremely happy to release a comprehensive roadmap that provides a detailed overview of the entire Star Atlas vision as it stands today. From Release 2.2 all the way through to Season 8, each stage of our journey is outlined. Within each season, you'll find cards detailing what to expect, with the option to click into each item for additional context.

A few important notes
While this roadmap offers a comprehensive view, please note that the further out a season is, the less detailed it may be.,However, rest assured that we'll be updating this roadmap frequently. As we flesh out future seasons, you can expect this document to be updated accordingly.,It's important to understand that while something may be included on this roadmap, development priorities can shift and things can and will change.,
Enjoy the roadmap and let us know what you think!

 | https://portal.productboard.com/staratlas/1-star-atlas-roadmap
